title: capsicum annuum var. cordiforme
intro: Capsicum annuum var. cordiforme, also known as cordiform pepper or heart-shaped pepper, is a variety of Capsicum annuum, a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of cordiform pepper include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Cordiform pepper is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and topical creams, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
